No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with 'Basic scientific knowledge and technology' and 'relevant skills' in nanotechnology (Target 4.4).

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course includes 'Nano-optics', which is fundamental to clean energy research like photovoltaics, providing an inferred link to Target 7.a.
